name: Exchange Rates
description_short: Official ECB exchange rates for the euro against all major currencies, available at daily, monthly, quarterly, and annual frequency. The definitive reference for EUR bilateral exchange rates and effective exchange rate indices.
use_cases: What is the current EUR/USD exchange rate?
How has the euro depreciated or appreciated against the dollar this year?
What is the nominal effective exchange rate of the euro?
How does the euro compare to a basket of trading partner currencies?
